segments.text: Yahweh spoke to Moses, saying,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Speak to the children of Israel, and tell them: ‘When either man or woman shall make a special vow, the vow of a Nazirite, to separate himself to Yahweh,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: he shall separate himself from wine and strong drink. He shall drink no vinegar of wine, or vinegar of fermented drink, neither shall he drink any juice of grapes, nor eat fresh grapes or dried.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: All the days of his separation he shall eat nothing that is made of the grapevine, from the seeds even to the skins.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: “‘All the days of his vow of separation no razor shall come on his head, until the days are fulfilled in which he separates himself to Yahweh. He shall be holy. He shall let the locks of the hair of his head grow long.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: “‘All the days that he separates himself to Yahweh he shall not go near a dead body.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: He shall not make himself unclean for his father, or for his mother, for his brother, or for his sister, when they die, because his separation to God is on his head.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: All the days of his separation he is holy to Yahweh.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: “‘If any man dies very suddenly beside him, and he defiles the head of his separation, then he shall shave his head in the day of his cleansing. On the seventh day he shall shave it.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: On the eighth day he shall bring two turtledoves or two young pigeons to the priest, to the door of the Tent of Meeting.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: The priest shall offer one for a sin offering, and the other for a burnt offering, and make atonement for him, because he sinned by reason of the dead, and shall make his head holy that same day.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: He shall separate to Yahweh the days of his separation, and shall bring a male lamb a year old for a trespass offering; but the former days shall be void, because his separation was defiled.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: “‘This is the law of the Nazirite: when the days of his separation are fulfilled, he shall be brought to the door of the Tent of Meeting,
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: and he shall offer his offering to Yahweh: one male lamb a year old without defect for a burnt offering, one ewe lamb a year old without defect for a sin offering, one ram without defect for peace offerings,
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: a basket of unleavened bread, cakes of fine flour mixed with oil, and unleavened wafers anointed with oil with their meal offering and their drink offerings.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: The priest shall present them before Yahweh, and shall offer his sin offering and his burnt offering.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: He shall offer the ram for a sacrifice of peace offerings to Yahweh, with the basket of unleavened bread. The priest shall offer also its meal offering and its drink offering.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: The Nazirite shall shave the head of his separation at the door of the Tent of Meeting, take the hair of the head of his separation, and put it on the fire which is under the sacrifice of peace offerings.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: The priest shall take the boiled shoulder of the ram, one unleavened cake out of the basket, and one unleavened wafer, and shall put them on the hands of the Nazirite after he has shaved the head of his separation;
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: and the priest shall wave them for a wave offering before Yahweh. They are holy for the priest, together with the breast that is waved and the thigh that is offered. After that the Nazirite may drink wine.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: “‘This is the law of the Nazirite who vows and of his offering to Yahweh for his separation, in addition to that which he is able to afford. According to his vow which he vows, so he must do after the law of his separation.’
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Yahweh spoke to Moses, saying,
Speak to Aaron and to his sons, saying, ‘This is how you shall bless the children of Israel.’ You shall tell them,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: ‘Yahweh bless you, and keep you.
segments.speaker: Aaron and his sons

segments.text:
Yahweh make his face to shine on you, 
and be gracious to you.
segments.speaker: Aaron and his sons

segments.text: Yahweh lift up his face toward you, and give you peace.’
segments.speaker: Aaron and his sons

segments.text: “So they shall put my name on the children of Israel; and I will bless them.
segments.speaker: The LORD
